title: nixling JSON manifest
description: Per-VM metadata manifest emitted by the nixling NixOS framework at /run/current-system/sw/share/nixling/vms.json. The contract consumed by the Rust CLI and daemon. See docs/reference/manifest-schema.md for the prose walkthrough and compatibility policy.

_manifest.description: Reserved schema-metadata key. The leading underscore disqualifies it as a VM name (vmNameOk regex requires a leading lowercase letter), so it cannot collide with any valid consumer config.

manifestVersion.description: Schema version. This document is the v7 schema; the field is locked to `const: 7`. v7 adds per-VM lifecycle.gracefulShutdown metadata so nixlingd can apply VM-specific graceful guest-shutdown policy while preserving v6 compatibility during the rollout.

observabilityMeta.description: Reserved observability-metadata key. Always emitted so consumers can discover the observability stack wiring without looking inside any single VM entry.

enabled.description: Mirror of nixling.observability.enable. The metadata block is still present when false.

vmName.description: VM name reserved for the observability stack (default: sys-obs).

obsVsockCid.description: Reserved Cloud Hypervisor vsock CID for the observability stack VM.

obsVsockHostSocket.description: Host-side Unix socket backing the observability stack VM's vsock device. Currently /var/lib/nixling/vms/<vm>/vsock.sock.

signozUrl.description: Resolved SigNoz UI URL derived from nixling.observability.signoz.{listenAddress,listenPort}.

signozOtlpGrpcPort.description: Loopback OTLP/gRPC port exposed by the SigNoz OTel Collector inside the observability VM.

signozOtlpHttpPort.description: Loopback OTLP/HTTP port exposed by the SigNoz OTel Collector inside the observability VM.

vmObservability.description: Per-VM observability transport metadata. Always emitted so consumers can rely on a stable transport metadata location.

vsockCid.description: Deterministic base Cloud Hypervisor vsock CID for nixos/Cloud Hypervisor VMs. Null for providers without nixling guest-control or in-guest observability.

vsockHostSocket.description: Host-side Unix socket backing this VM's Cloud Hypervisor vsock device. Null for providers without nixling guest-control or in-guest observability.

agentSocket.description: In-guest Unix socket reserved for the workload observability agent. Null for providers without in-guest observability.

vmLanPolicy.description: Per-VM LAN east-west policy metadata for env-backed VMs.

allowEastWest.description: Raw nixling.envs.<env>.allowEastWest setting for this VM's env.

effectiveEastWest.description: Effective east-west policy after combining env and site opt-ins.

runtimeCapabilities.description: Runtime/provider support matrix. These booleans describe support, not whether a per-VM option currently enables a feature.

runtimeOperationCapabilities.description: Positive runtime operation support grouped by public feature axis.

optional.description: Whether absence of the service is acceptable for this runtime.

vmShell.description: Persistent guest shell policy metadata for providers that support the authenticated guest-control terminal substrate. Null for runtime providers without nixling guest-control.

enabled.description: True iff nixling.vms.<name>.guest.shell.enable is set on a provider that supports persistent guest shells.

maxSessions.description: Maximum persistent shell sessions for this VM.

maxAttached.description: Maximum concurrently attached persistent shell clients for this VM.

vmGracefulShutdown.description: Per-VM graceful guest shutdown policy consumed by nixlingd.

enable.description: True iff nixlingd should attempt provider-aware graceful guest shutdown before falling back to forced VMM cleanup for this VM.

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional per-VM graceful shutdown timeout override, in seconds. Null means daemon-config.json gracefulShutdownTimeoutSeconds applies.

vmLifecycle.description: Per-VM lifecycle policy consumed by nixlingd.

runtimeMetadata.description: Runtime/provider metadata and capability summary for one VM.

vmEntry.description: Per-VM metadata, indexed under the VM's name in the top-level object.

name.description: VM name. Matches the enclosing top-level key. Pattern enforced by nixos-modules/assertions.nix's vmNameOk.

graphics.description: True iff nixling.vms.<name>.graphics.enable is set. The CLI uses this to pick the launch path.

usbipYubikey.description: True iff nixling.vms.<name>.usbip.yubikey is set. `nixling usb attach|detach|probe` refuses to run when false. The legacy `nixling usb <vm>` bash orchestrator was retired per ADR 0015.

audio.description: True iff nixling.vms.<name>.audio.enable is set. Capability bit; live grant state lives in audioStateFile.

tap.description: Host-side tap-device name. Derived: <env>-l<index> (workload), <env>-u2 (net VM), or vm-<name> (legacy).

bridge.description: Linux bridge the tap attaches to. Workload: br-<env>-lan. Net VM: br-<env>-up. Legacy hand-rolled VM: null.

env.description: Env this VM belongs to (workload) or serves (net VM). Null for legacy hand-rolled VMs.

mtu.description: Effective MTU for env-backed VMs when emitted. Omitted for legacy/env-less VMs.

mssClamp.description: Effective TCP MSS clamp for env-backed VMs when emitted. Omitted when no clamp is configured.

isNetVm.description: True iff this VM is the auto-generated sys-<env>-net for some env.

netVm.description: For workload VMs: name of the net VM serving this VM's env. Null for net VMs themselves and legacy VMs.

usbipdHostIp.description: Host IP of the per-env usbipd proxy. `nixling usb attach` passes this to `usbip attach -r` via the broker SpawnRunner DAG. The legacy `nixling usb <vm>` bash orchestrator was retired per ADR 0015. Null for net VMs and legacy.

apiSocket.description: Cloud Hypervisor runner API socket path (<stateDir>/<name>.sock). Null for providers without a Cloud Hypervisor API socket.

gpuSocket.description: crosvm-gpu sidecar control socket (<stateDir>/<name>-gpu.sock). Null for providers without a nixling GPU sidecar socket.

tpmSocket.description: swtpm vTPM socket path (/run/nixling/vms/<name>/tpm.sock). Null for providers without nixling-managed TPM state.

audioStateFile.description: Live audio-grant state file (<stateDir>/state/audio-state.json). Null for providers without the nixling audio sidecar.

audioService.description: Host-side audio sidecar systemd unit name (nixling-<name>-snd.service). Null for providers without the nixling audio sidecar.

shell.description: Persistent guest shell policy metadata, or null for providers without nixling guest-control.

staticIp.description: VM's static LAN IP. Derived for env-attached VMs. Null when no IP source applies.

sshUser.description: Username for nixling-driven SSH. Mirrors nixling.vms.<name>.ssh.user. Null for headless net VMs.
